outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed short-term (positive GEX), but negative weekly/monthly GEX signals potential volatility expansion if 6600 support breaks
outlook.summary: Spot at 6673.25 caught between 6600 Max Pain magnet and 6700 high-activity pivot. 0DTE shows extreme call volume (5-8x OI) suggesting aggressive bullish day trading despite bearish skew (1.39-1.41). Total GEX +18.34B suppresses volatility but weekly/monthly negative GEX (-9.79B combined) creates structural fragility. Extreme PCR (3.76 monthly) indicates oversold conditions - bounce potential toward 6700-6785.
